ksa_text: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Technical Foundations is an edge domain for the Director of Data Operations, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.461) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Technical Foundations), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.461). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Operations versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technical foundation knowledge is validated by DCWF, NICE framework, and engineering director job postings as required for technical leadership oversight.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Technical Foundations appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Operations.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.461. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Data Operations.
